title: Kenshi ⚔ [PvP Pack]
description: A 32x Vanilla+ PvP texturepack. Many sweet features including custom glints, outlines, etc.
body:
# Kenshi PvP Texture Pack (1.20.5 – 1.21.x)

Made with Dia Pot, Sword, Axe, UHC and SMP gamemodes in mind.

## Features:
- Custom armor textures

- Custom sword textures

- Custom enchantment glint

- Low fire

- Clean UI and particles

- AppleSkin compatible

## Compatibility:
Minecraft 1.20.5 to 1.21.x

Works with OptiFine and Iris

Compatible with Vanilla, Fabric, and Forge
